name: regennexus-uap
description:
## Features
- **Device Control**: GPIO, PWM, sensors, cameras
- **Robotic Arms**: Amber B1, Lucid One with gripper support
- **Mesh Networking**: Auto-discovery across LAN
- **Security**: AES-256 encryption, token auth

## Installation
pip install regennexus
